description: Outcome record from evaluating a SignerEntry against an action via SignerCompetenceRule. Threaded into AccessDecision.signer_competence_result via the v8.5.0 EXTEND.

result_id.description: Stable opaque identifier for this result (UUID v4).

signer_id.description: Foreign key to SignerEntry.signer_id within the relevant Keyring.

rule_id_matched.description: Foreign key to SignerCompetenceRule.rule_id when a rule matched. Absent for outcomes that did not engage the rule set (e.g., dev_signature short-circuit).

outcome.description: Outcome enum for policy-decision shapes (AccessDecision.outcome, SignerCompetenceResult.outcome). 5 substrate-agnostic members.

anyOf.description: Action is permitted; consumer may proceed.
Action is denied; consumer MUST NOT proceed.
Decision deferred to a human or higher-trust process. Consumer holds the action.
Cryptographic / class-validation step succeeded. Pair with another field for the policy verdict.
Cryptographic / class-validation step failed. Distinct from policy-level deny.
